finding: `node atm.dev.mjs tasks release --wip-commit` can reach an inner `git commit`, but Git still invokes the installed pre-commit hook through frozen `node atm.mjs hook pre-commit`. When the frozen runner lacks the new WIP bypass or candidate-line policy, source-first recovery deadlocks on stale hook behavior.
expectedBehavior: Source-first governed commands that perform commits should either route hooks through the same source-first runner, pass a sealed hook runner override, or fail early with an executable recoveryCommand that updates the frozen runner without requiring the blocked commit.
evidenceOrRepro: ATM-GOV-0258 WIP park attempts: frozen `tasks release --wip-commit` returned ATM_CLI_USAGE; source-first release after lane adopt failed inside git commit because frozen pre-commit emitted ATM_TOUCHED_PHYSICAL_LINE_BUDGET_BLOCKED.
followUp: Add a source-first hook bridge or bootstrap-safe WIP commit lane. Ensure the recovery does not require publishing release/** while foreign non-release WIP is still present.
